title: Compose Specification, Services, Projects, Dependencies, and Lifecycle · Spiral Delivery Review
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs compose specification, services, projects, dependencies, and lifecycle from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the validated multi-service Compose application model under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for validated multi-service Compose application model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Explain the current Compose Specification and service, network, volume, config, secret, project, and optional implementation boundaries.
Resolve project name, working directory, files, includes, merges, interpolation, environment sources, and canonical config output.
Define image or build source, command, entrypoint, environment, user, working directory, health, resources, and metadata per service.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Compose Spec Model · changed case · Review Docker Compose Spec Model
steps.instruction:
review case — A review three-service project has hidden interpolation, name collisions, start-order assumptions, a mutable image, and teardown that may delete intake data. Render the model, dry-run lifecycle, and prove preservation. Competency probe: Explain the current Compose Specification and service, network, volume, config, secret, project, and optional implementation boundaries.

Which action demonstrates Docker Compose Spec Model without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Docker Compose Spec Model · changed case · Review Docker Compose Spec Model.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain the current compose specification and service, network, volume, config, secret, project, and optional implementation boundaries. For Docker Compose Spec Model · changed case · Review Docker Compose Spec Model, keep Docker Compose Spec Model connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
